texto: I don't believe that there are any situations or any person on this planet who can not be helped, whose life can not be made better. And many of these situations can be cured. If your doctor does not know something, it does not mean that the knowledge does not exist elsewhere. No body is beyond hope. No body!
explicacao: Citação de Natasha Campbell-McBride sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I don't believe that there are any situations or any person on this planet who can not be helped,…” articula reflexao, healing, health em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como health.
